location: Guaranteed drop from Demi-Human Queen Marigga, an optional field boss found at a beached/crashed ship at the far northwest end of a coastal ravine on the Cerulean Coast.
tactics: From the Cerulean Coast West Site of Grace, head into the narrow canyon/ravine to the north, take the left fork, and continue until the coastline with the wrecked ship comes into view.
The beach is crowded with demi-human mobs — approaching Marigga directly can cause her to summon them all at once, so clear stragglers individually first if possible.
She mixes ranged glintstone sorceries with a melee sword moveset; staying in close range limits her mostly to the more telegraphed melee swings.
A separate, weaker demi-human swordsman elsewhere on the beach carries a visually identical Star-Lined Sword but only drops Starlight Shards — don't mistake killing it for the boss fight.
lore: The blade is studded with a line of star-shaped glintstone shards and was the mark of a demi-human swordsman in Marigga's service. Receiving it from their queen bound the wielder to an oath: to follow the line of stars to whatever truth waited at its end.

builds.name: Dex/Int hybrid bleed katana
builds.why: Scales C in Dexterity and D in Intelligence with a built-in 45 hemorrhage buildup, so it rewards a dex-leaning build that's also dipped into Intelligence rather than a pure strength or pure dex katana user.
